cadence: two AI insight posts per day

items.theme: AI ROI hides in integration, not inference.
items.asset_brief: Two-panel meme: 'we budgeted for tokens' vs. 'permissions, evals, workflow, observability'.

x.copy:
Model cost is the easy line item. The real AI budget goes to data plumbing, permissions, evals, observability, workflow redesign, and the last mile into the system people already use.

More field notes: https://8bitconcepts.com/research/the-integration-tax.html

linkedin.copy:
Model cost is the easy line item. The real AI budget goes to data plumbing, permissions, evals, observability, workflow redesign, and the last mile into the system people already use.

The useful question for operators is what changes in the system around the model: state, workflow, evals, policy, and feedback loops.

More field notes:
https://8bitconcepts.com/research/the-integration-tax.html

items.theme: Prompt quality stops compounding without memory.
items.asset_brief: Simple diagram: prompt -> run -> lesson -> expertise file -> next run.

x.copy:
The mistake is treating agent instructions like a constitution. Most of them are lab notes. They need revision, pruning, and evidence from real runs.

More field notes: https://8bitconcepts.com/research/
